name: Mass Casualty Incident Response
description: Activated for events with casualties exceeding local medical capacity. Coordinates triage, transport, and mutual aid across multiple hubs. Time-critical — every step has hard deadlines.

steps.action: Classify incident scope: estimate casualty count, hazard type, area affected
steps.note: Do NOT wait for perfect data — estimate and update

steps.action: Bypass normal resource allocation — all medical resources redirected to incident
steps.justification: Mass casualty event requires immediate resource commandeering per ICS protocol

steps.action: ANNOUNCE mass casualty event to ALL hubs — broadcast on every available channel
Query all hubs for medical_kits, medical_personnel, transport capacity. Rank by proximity and ETA.
Establish casualty collection point at nearest viable hub. Stage transport at 2 closest hubs.
If casualties exceed regional capacity, escalate to mutual aid / ICS Type 1 incident
Dispatch medical transport along optimized routes. Track all movements.
Confirm patient counts at each receiving facility. Reconcile with initial estimate.
Full ICS-214 activity log: timeline, resources deployed, decisions, authority chain, outcomes
